welcome: 👋 Welcome to our family! I'm the Shajara bot.
start_choose_action: What would you like to do?
create_ask_name: Give your new family a name. For example: The Aliyev Family
create_done:
🎉 Congratulations! Family «{name}» has been created.

Next step — create a Telegram group and add the bot as administrator.
create_group_steps: 📋 Steps: 1. Create a new Telegram group. 2. Add the bot to the group and make it admin. 3. Done — the group will connect automatically! Tap the button below to add the bot to a group:
already_member: ✅ You are already a member of {names}.
no_families: No families connected yet. Please contact the family admin.
